title: AngularJS → Angular 19 Migration
description: Led large-scale migration of multiple Nissan enterprise applications from AngularJS/Angular 4 to Angular 17–20. Delivered 40% performance improvement, reduced technical debt significantly, and modernized the entire frontend architecture.

title: Nissan – Enterprise Dashboard (AG Grid)
description: Built high-performance data-heavy dashboards using AG Grid with custom cell renderers and row grouping. Boosted rendering efficiency by 30% using virtual scrolling and optimized change detection strategies.

title: AWS Cloud Migration & Monitoring
description: Supported migration of on-premises infrastructure to AWS. Triggered Jenkins deployments via pull requests using Bitbucket. Monitored application health, performance metrics, and resource utilization on AWS ECS.

title: AI-Assisted Development with AWS Kiro
description: Integrated AWS Kiro with Autopilot and Supervised Modes for AI-driven code generation and task automation. Applied Spec-Driven Development and MCP (Model Context Protocol) for context-aware AI workflows, accelerating feature delivery.

title: Reusable Angular Component Library
description: Designed and built a shared component library with reusable components, services, directives, and pipes in TypeScript. Implemented NgRx for centralized state management and RxJS for reactive async data flows across multiple applications.
